projects.title: MetaExtract
projects.tagline: Extract 45,000+ metadata fields from any document
projects.description: A production-grade metadata extraction engine that parses PDFs, images, and documents at scale. Handles 45K+ field types with high accuracy using a combination of rule-based and ML approaches.
projects.problem: Organizations need to extract structured metadata from thousands of heterogeneous documents — invoices, contracts, medical records, research papers — each with different formats and field layouts.
projects.approach: Built a FastAPI backend with a modular extraction pipeline. Each document type gets a dedicated parser combining regex patterns, layout analysis, and ML classification. Results are normalized into a unified schema and served via REST API with React dashboard for monitoring.
projects.result: Production-grade metadata extraction system built for document-heavy healthcare workflows.

projects.title: CodeCollector
projects.tagline: Codebase analysis CLI — zero-config pattern detection and complexity reports
projects.description: A command-line tool that scans codebases, extracts patterns, and generates structured analysis reports. Built for developers who need quick insights into code quality and architecture.
projects.problem: Developers joining new projects or auditing existing codebases need quick, structured insights without setting up heavy analysis tools or IDEs.
projects.approach: Built as a Python CLI using AST parsing and pattern matching. Generates JSON/Markdown reports with metrics on code complexity, duplication, dependency graphs, and anti-pattern detection. Designed for zero-config usage with sensible defaults.
projects.result: Developer CLI tool for codebase inspection, pattern detection, and security analysis. Used by developers for quick codebase audits.

projects.title: Caption Art
projects.tagline: AI-powered creative automation for visual content
projects.description: An AI creative tool that generates artistic captions, applies style transfers, and creates visual content using generative AI models. Combines text generation with image manipulation.
projects.problem: Content creators and social media managers spend hours crafting captions and visual styles for each post. Existing tools are either too generic or require design skills.
projects.approach: React + TypeScript frontend with FastAPI backend. Integrated Fal AI for generative models. Users upload images, select style parameters, and the system generates styled captions and visual variations. Pipeline includes image analysis, style matching, and text generation.
projects.result: Functional prototype demonstrating multi-modal AI creative pipeline. Showcases integration of generative AI with practical content workflows.

projects.title: SignKit
projects.tagline: Signature extraction & PDF signing — commercial desktop product
projects.description: A commercial desktop application for signature extraction and PDF document processing. PySide6 frontend with FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL database, and PDF signing capabilities. Handles batch document workflows for legal and financial teams. Built from idea to paid product.
projects.problem: Legal and financial teams process thousands of signed documents daily. They need signature extraction, PDF signing, and organized output management in one complete workflow.
projects.approach: PySide6 cross-platform desktop app with FastAPI backend. PostgreSQL for document metadata and user management. OpenCV-based signature extraction with morphological operations. PDF signing with embedded certificate support.
projects.result: Commercial signature extraction product built from idea to paid product, including extraction, signing, and workflow tooling.

projects.title: EchoPanel
projects.tagline: macOS menu bar audio capture & transcription
projects.description: A native macOS menu bar app that captures system audio, transcribes it in real-time using Whisper, and provides searchable transcripts. Built with Swift frontend and FastAPI backend.
projects.problem: Professionals in meetings, interviews, and research need to capture and search audio content without switching between multiple tools or relying on cloud services.
projects.approach: Swift menu bar app using AVFoundation for audio capture. FastAPI backend with Whisper for transcription. SQLite for local transcript storage with full-text search. Designed for minimal UI presence with maximum utility.
projects.result: macOS menu bar prototype combining native UX, audio capture, and AI transcription.

projects.title: EchoAI-MLX
projects.tagline: Fine-tuned Whisper on Apple Silicon
projects.description: Fine-tuned Whisper speech recognition model optimized for Apple Silicon using the MLX framework. Demonstrates on-device ML training and inference.
projects.problem: Cloud-based speech recognition has latency, privacy, and cost issues. On-device models need optimization for specific hardware and use cases.
projects.approach: Used Apple's MLX framework to fine-tune Whisper on domain-specific audio data. Optimized for Apple Silicon GPU and Neural Engine. Benchmarking against base Whisper models for accuracy and speed.
projects.result: Demonstrated on-device ML fine-tuning capabilities on Apple Silicon. Contributed learnings to local-first AI development approaches.

projects.title: PhotoSearch
projects.tagline: Modular AI photo workstation — semantic search, face recognition & clustering
projects.description: A full-stack AI photo workstation using FastAPI backend with LanceDB vector storage, CLIP semantic search, and InsightFace face recognition. Tauri desktop app with React frontend. Handles 10K+ photo libraries with sub-second semantic search.
projects.problem: Photo libraries grow to tens of thousands of images. Traditional folder/tag organization breaks down. People need semantic search — 'find photos of the beach at sunset' or 'photos with Sarah'.
projects.approach: FastAPI backend with LanceDB for vector storage. CLIP generates embeddings for semantic search. InsightFace identifies and clusters faces. Tauri desktop app with React frontend. Modular architecture separating ML pipeline from UI.
projects.result: Photo search workstation using multimodal retrieval, semantic search, and face recognition.

projects.title: Robonomics
projects.tagline: Robot workforce data journalism & visualization
projects.description: A data journalism project analyzing robot workforce trends, automation impact, and labor market shifts through interactive visualizations and data stories.
projects.problem: Public discourse on automation and robots replacing jobs is driven by anecdotes rather than data. People need clear, data-driven perspectives on how automation is actually reshaping work.
projects.approach: Collected and cleaned public datasets on robot installations, employment statistics, and productivity metrics. Built interactive visualizations showing trends by industry, region, and job type. Data stories with narrative context.
projects.result: Published data stories with interactive charts. Demonstrates data storytelling and analytical communication skills.

projects.title: Bas5Minute
projects.tagline: Isochrone travel maps for Indian cities
projects.description: An isochrone map tool that visualizes how far you can travel in 5, 10, 15 minutes from any point in Indian cities using public transport, walking, and driving.
projects.problem: Urban planners, real estate analysts, and commuters in Indian cities lack tools to visualize actual travel accessibility. Google Maps shows routes but not aggregate reachability.
projects.approach: Built with mapping APIs and routing engines. Generates isochrone polygons for different transport modes. Interactive map interface with time sliders. Optimized for Indian city road networks and transit data.
projects.result: Functional tool for Indian city accessibility analysis. Demonstrates geospatial data processing and mapping skills.

projects.title: Appscript Work
projects.tagline: Freelance marketplace platform — client work via Upwork (Guus project)
projects.description: A freelance marketplace platform built as client work through Upwork. Connects freelancers with businesses seeking specific technical services.
projects.problem: Client needed a marketplace platform connecting skilled freelancers with businesses. Required user management, project posting, bidding, and payment integration.
projects.approach: Full-stack web application with user authentication, project listings, bidding system, messaging, and payment processing. Built for scalability with clean API design.
projects.result: Delivered as client project via Upwork. Demonstrates ability to ship production-quality work for paying clients.

projects.title: Advay Learning
projects.tagline: MediaPipe-powered educational app for children with gesture recognition
projects.description: An educational Android app for children using MediaPipe for real-time hand gesture recognition. Children interact with learning content through physical movements captured by the device camera. Adaptive difficulty based on performance. Built with Flutter/Dart for Android.
projects.problem: Traditional educational apps for children are passive screen time. Parents and educators want interactive, physical-movement-based learning that engages kids beyond tapping screens.
projects.approach: Built with MediaPipe for real-time hand gesture recognition. Children interact with educational content through physical movements. Flutter/Dart for Android with real-time CV pipeline.
projects.result: Working educational app demonstrating AI-powered interactive education for children. Shows ability to build engaging mobile experiences with cutting-edge CV technology.

projects.title: SceneGuide v3
projects.tagline: Computer vision accessibility app for blind & elderly users (v3)
projects.description: An accessibility-focused mobile app using computer vision to describe scenes, read text, and identify objects for visually impaired and elderly users. Built with Flutter/Dart for Android with real-time scene analysis, OCR, and audio feedback. Version 3 with improved accuracy and new features.
projects.problem: Visually impaired and elderly users struggle with daily tasks that require visual understanding — reading labels, navigating spaces, identifying objects. They need simple, reliable assistance for everyday visual tasks.
projects.approach: Flutter app using device camera for real-time scene analysis. Object detection, OCR, and scene description via optimized CV models. Audio feedback for accessibility. Large touch targets and voice-first interaction designed for elderly users.
projects.result: Working mobile app demonstrating accessible AI application design. Shows commitment to inclusive technology and mobile CV deployment.

projects.title: TabPilot
projects.tagline: Native macOS Swift app for managing and organizing browser tabs
projects.description: A native macOS Swift app for managing and organizing browser tabs across multiple windows. Uses native macOS APIs for Chrome tab management with AppleScript automation. Staging-first development workflow with production-ready architecture.
projects.problem: Power users accumulate hundreds of Chrome tabs across dozens of windows. Browser tab management is limited and doesn't support cross-window operations or intelligent organization.
projects.approach: Native Swift macOS app with widget extension. AppleScript-based Chrome automation. Widget for quick tab previews. Clean Architecture with proper separation of concerns.
projects.result: Working native macOS app demonstrating advanced Swift development, macOS platform integration, and native app distribution.

projects.title: Vespr
projects.tagline: Voice-first journaling app — React Native/Expo
projects.description: A voice-first journaling mobile app built with React Native and Expo. Users capture thoughts by voice, with AI-powered transcription, tagging, and mood analysis.
projects.problem: Traditional journaling requires typing, which creates friction. Most people think faster than they type. Voice capture lowers the barrier to consistent journaling.
projects.approach: React Native + Expo for cross-platform mobile. Voice recording with Whisper transcription. AI-powered tagging and mood analysis. Simple, calming UI designed for daily use with minimal interaction.
projects.result: Functional mobile app on iOS and Android. Demonstrates mobile development and AI integration in consumer applications.

projects.title: model-lab
projects.tagline: On-device audio AI — MLX, Whisper & model evaluation infrastructure
projects.description: A systematic audio AI experimentation repo including model-lab: a production-ready model testing framework for ASR, TTS, and chat models. Features automated scorecards, production grades (A/B/C), cost analysis, and multi-device benchmarking (MPS/CUDA/CPU). Supports Whisper, LFM2.5-Audio, and on-device Apple Silicon optimization.
projects.problem: Selecting the right audio AI model requires systematic evaluation across accuracy, speed, cost, and hardware — not just running a few tests. Teams need infrastructure to make deployment decisions with data.
projects.approach: Built model-lab as a repeatable evaluation framework with shared harness, identical metrics, and automated comparison dashboards. Tested across Apple Silicon MPS, NVIDIA CUDA, and CPU. Produced production readiness grades for Whisper variants and LFM2.5-Audio.
projects.result: Contributed to local-first AI development approaches. model-lab enables systematic model selection decisions rather than intuition-based choices.

projects.title: Waste Segregation App
projects.tagline: AI-powered waste classification — Flutter app with Firebase & gamification
projects.description: A comprehensive Flutter cross-platform app for waste identification and segregation guidance using AI-powered image classification. Uses OpenAI GPT-4.1-nano and Gemini Vision for item identification across 5 waste categories (wet, dry, hazardous, medical, non-waste). Features gamification with points, achievements, streaks, and family dashboards. Firebase Firestore for real-time sync, Hive for local storage, published to Google Play.
projects.problem: Improper waste segregation is a major environmental problem. People don't know how to classify waste correctly, leading to recycling contamination and increased landfill burden.
projects.approach: Flutter cross-platform app with camera/gallery image capture. OpenAI and Gemini Vision AI for classification. Gamification system with points, achievements, challenges, and family dashboards. Firebase Firestore for cloud sync, Hive for offline local storage. Educational content on waste categories. Community-driven disposal facility database.
projects.result: Published to Google Play (May 2025), 698 commits, comprehensive AI waste classification app with gamification and community features.

projects.title: Insurance RAG
projects.tagline: RAG-based insurance document Q&A system
projects.description: A RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) system for insurance documents. Allows querying insurance policies, claims, and documents using natural language with accurate, sourced answers.
projects.problem: Insurance documents are complex and lengthy. Agents and customers struggle to find specific information about coverage, claims, and policy details.
projects.approach: Built a RAG pipeline for insurance documents with vector embeddings and LLM-powered Q&A. Document chunking, embedding generation, and semantic search for accurate retrieval with source citations.
projects.result: Working RAG system for insurance document Q&A. Demonstrates LLM application development and vector database integration.

projects.title: ShowMeTime
projects.tagline: Live teaching app for kids to learn clock — showmetime.com
projects.description: A live web app for teaching children how to read clocks and tell time. Interactive exercises and visual learning for kids. Published at showmetime.com.
projects.problem: Children struggle to learn analog and digital time concepts. Traditional teaching methods aren't engaging or interactive enough.
projects.approach: Built a web app with interactive clock exercises, visual feedback, and progressive difficulty. Designed for young learners with engaging UI and gamified learning.
projects.result: Live app at showmetime.com. Demonstrates ability to ship consumer-facing web products.

projects.title: Kenya SHIF
projects.tagline: Health insurance project for Kenya's Social Health Insurance Fund
projects.description: A project for Kenya's Social Health Insurance Fund (SHIF) — the new national health insurance system replacing NHIF. Built as a freelance engagement.
projects.problem: Kenya transitioned from NHIF to SHIF requiring new systems for enrollment, contributions, and benefits management.
projects.approach: Built systems to support SHIF registration, contribution tracking, and benefits verification for the new national health insurance scheme.
projects.result: Completed freelance project for Kenya health insurance system transition. One-off engagement that a hiring manager gave but didn't pursue.

projects.title: File Info Explorer
projects.tagline: VS Code extension for file metadata exploration
projects.description: A VS Code extension for exploring and visualizing file metadata, sizes, and directory structure within the editor.
projects.problem: Developers need quick insights into file sizes, modification times, and directory structures without leaving their editor.
projects.approach: VS Code extension that provides file tree visualization, size information, and metadata browsing directly in the editor.
projects.result: Published VS Code extension. Demonstrates developer tooling experience.

projects.title: Frame Analyser
projects.tagline: Video frame-by-frame AI analyser — React, TypeScript, Vite
projects.description: A video analysis tool that processes videos frame-by-frame using AI. Built with React, TypeScript, and Vite for the frontend.
projects.problem: Video analysis for detailed inspection requires frame-by-frame review. Existing tools are either too basic or too complex for quick AI-powered video analysis.
projects.approach: Built a web app that uploads videos and runs AI analysis on individual frames. React/TypeScript frontend with Vite for fast development and performance.
projects.result: Working video analysis tool. Demonstrates AI integration with video processing and React frontend development.

projects.title: Agents Platform
projects.tagline: Local-first multi-agent orchestration with human-gated risk tiers
projects.description: A protocol-first, local-first multi-agent orchestration platform with human-gated risk tiers. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, LangGraph, and ADK runtimes. Features durable local snapshot persistence, background adapter run queue, and pluggable policy engine.
projects.problem: Multi-agent systems need proper orchestration, risk management, and human oversight. Existing frameworks lack fine-grained control over agent actions and risk tiers.
projects.approach: Built a platform with structured task-thread collaboration, human-gated risk tiers, and adapter model for multiple LLM runtimes. Local-first with snapshot persistence for restart recovery.
projects.result: Working multi-agent platform scaffold with production-oriented architecture. Supports multiple AI providers with reliability controls.

projects.title: avia_new
projects.tagline: Enterprise audio/video transcription platform with admin dashboard
projects.description: Enterprise-scale audio/video transcription and entity extraction platform with comprehensive admin dashboard and business analytics. Features advanced audio preprocessing (spectral analysis, pitch detection, fingerprinting), NLP model management, action item extraction from meeting transcripts, and enterprise features including SSO, compliance, and multi-tenant support.
projects.problem: Enterprises need to transcribe, analyze, and extract value from large volumes of audio/video content at scale with proper admin controls and analytics.
projects.approach: Full-stack enterprise platform with Python/TypeScript stack. Whisper-based transcription, spaCy NLP, advanced audio preprocessing, admin dashboard with revenue tracking and user management, multi-tenant architecture with SSO support.
projects.result: Enterprise audio/video intelligence platform with comprehensive features for business analytics and transcription workflows.

projects.title: AI Glossary Pro
projects.tagline: AI terminology reference and definitions database
projects.description: A comprehensive AI terminology reference tool providing definitions and explanations for AI/ML terms and concepts. Built as a quick-reference resource for AI practitioners.
projects.problem: AI terminology is vast and rapidly evolving. Practitioners need quick access to clear definitions of AI/ML terms without searching through lengthy documentation.
projects.approach: Simple web application with organized AI terminology database and search functionality for quick term lookup.
projects.result: Reference tool for AI terminology. Demonstrates ability to organize and present technical information accessibly.

services.title: AI/ML Product Prototypes
services.description: From concept to working prototype in 2–4 weeks. I build AI-powered prototypes that validate your idea with real users — not slide decks.
deliverables: Working prototype with core AI functionality
services.idealFor: Founders with an AI product idea who need to validate fast

services.title: Workflow Automation & Internal Tools
services.description: Automate repetitive processes and build internal tools that save your team hours every week. Document processing, data pipelines, dashboards, and integrations.
services.idealFor: Teams drowning in manual processes and data work

services.title: Technical Advisory
services.description: Architecture reviews, AI/ML approach evaluation, and product roadmap planning. For teams making critical technical decisions who need a second opinion.
services.idealFor: Teams making critical technical decisions with senior stakes

process.title: Discovery Call
process.description: We discuss your problem, constraints, and goals. I ask questions to understand the technical and business context.

process.title: Proposal & Scope
process.description: I send a clear proposal with timeline, deliverables, and pricing. No surprises.

process.title: Build & Iterate
process.description: I build in weekly milestones. You see working software every week, not status reports.

process.title: Deliver & Support
process.description: Working software delivered with documentation. 30-day support period included.

faq.question: What's the smallest scope you've taken?
faq.answer: The smallest was a two-week document extraction prototype for a healthcare startup that needed to validate before their board meeting. They had a vague brief, I scoped it, built it, and they used the results to justify a full build. If the problem is clear and the scope is real, I'll take it on.

faq.question: What if I only have a vague idea?
faq.answer: That's fine. Most good engagements start with 'we have this problem and we think AI might help.' I ask a lot of questions in the discovery call to get to the actual problem — not the stated solution. If the fit isn't there, I'll tell you.

faq.question: Do you work with existing teams?
faq.answer: Yes. I've augmented teams for specific sprints and projects. I'm comfortable working in your codebase, your workflow, and your stack — as long as the problem is well-defined.

faq.question: What does a typical week look like?
faq.answer: Week 1 is discovery and scoping. Week 2 onwards, you get a working demo every Friday. You see code, you see the system working, you can interact with it. Not a slide deck, not a status report.

faq.question: Do you handle deployment and DevOps?
faq.answer: Yes. Docker containers, AWS deployments, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring are included in prototype and automation engagements. I don't hand off 'call someone else to deploy.'

Reduced insurance sales & ops TAT from ~4 weeks → ~10 days via workflow automation
Launched Instaclinic, HCPwire, HCPconnect from concept → MVP → scaled adoption
Built content program with 50+ healthcare professional contributors
Integrated AI features (OCR, RAG) as product enhancements
Led ISO 27001 recertification and SOC 2 compliance programs
Built and scaled cross-functional teams across product, engineering, and ops
Delivered SAP Sales & Distribution implementations for retail and consumer clients
Achieved $2M+ in savings through process re-engineering and workflow automation
Ran requirements, blueprinting, testing, and end-user training for ERP rollouts
Recognized with multiple EY Excellence Awards for client delivery
Built automation frameworks reducing telecom document processing time
Implemented data pipelines and metadata layers for network inventory management

education.institution: FORE School of Management, New Delhi
